opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $45 cover saved my couch from my dog (and from getting tossed)
opportunities.before_state: Worn, stained, pet-hair-covered couch with visible scratches and shedding fur embedded in the cushions
opportunities.after_state: Crisp, tailored-looking slipcover in a clean neutral tone, dog now happily lounging on top of it
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's pet-and-home Pinterest pin is actively surfacing pet-friendly living room content, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes this the highest-value transformation angle available.

opportunities.specific_product: Amazon stain-proof washable area rug (Ruggable-style dupe)
opportunities.transformation_hook: Swapped our stained living room rug for an $89 washable one
opportunities.before_state: Faded, stained rug with visible spills and matted fibers dragging down the whole room
opportunities.after_state: Bright, patterned washable rug that ties the room together and can be tossed in the wash
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple's Pinterest pin flags a live Ruggable summer sale, meaning washable-rug demand is surging in mainstream home content right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper neck pain pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Fixed my side-sleeper neck pain with a $34 pillow swap
opportunities.before_state: Flat, lumpy old pillow causing visible neck strain and restless sleep positioning
opportunities.after_state: Contoured supportive pillow with properly aligned neck and a made-up, hotel-style bed
buyer_intent_keywords: pillow for shoulder pain side sleeper
opportunities.why_now: Bedroom refresh content (dorm bed setups, headboards) is trending on Pinterest, and neck-pain search intent stays consistently high — a strong entry point for Eli & Elm's 20% commission.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products gold vanity mirror + floor lamp set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turned a dark bedroom corner into a glam vanity for under $30
opportunities.before_state: Dim, empty corner or cluttered desk with no lighting or personality
opportunities.after_state: Warmly lit gold-accented vanity nook with mirror, styled like a mini glam station
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's Pinterest feed shows gold accents repeating across multiple dorm/bedroom pins (mirror, lamp, tray) — a clear micro-trend forming before back-to-school season.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Ditched bottled water with a $32 filter pitcher upgrade
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered fridge shelf stacked with plastic water bottles and a plain tap glass
opportunities.after_state: Sleek filter pitcher on a clean counter, clear glass of filtered water poured
buyer_intent_keywords: water filter pitcher recommended by experts
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple's Pinterest pin on expert-recommended filter pitchers signals rising kitchen-water-quality interest heading into peak summer hydration season.
